01 · About

THE WRITER

3+ Years · Bilingual · Riyadh

Detail-oriented creative copywriter with 3+ years of experience developing effective marketing campaigns for diverse clients across Saudi Arabia.

Skilled at turning brand insights into clear, resonant concepts: from KV scripts and social copy to articles and packaging. Fluent in both Arabic and English, maintaining a distinct platform-specific tone in each.

Currently pursuing screenwriting, with specialized training at SPT Academy and The Righters House.

Buheis Creative
Creative Copywriter

Riffad
Copywriter
  • Write annual bilingual content for one of Saudi Arabia's leading Hajj operators, with work reaching millions of pilgrims, clients, and professionals across the Hajj sector each season
  • Produce multilingual Nusk ID cards in Turkish, English, Bengali, and Somali, coordinating with in-country translation teams to maintain legal accuracy and cultural sensitivity across four languages

Hajj Seasons · 2023–Present
Al-Rifadah
Copywriter
  • Build and refresh Al-Rifadah's brand voice and messaging framework each season, shaping the tone, language standards, and campaign identity for a Hajj and pilgrimage services organization
  • Write Arabic and English copy for pre-season campaigns, service announcements, and pilgrim-facing digital materials, with content trusted by millions across the Hajj sector annually
  • Develop taglines, campaign concepts, and content calendars positioning Al-Rifadah as a modern, dependable Hajj operator

04 · Project

JAWN

Founder · 2020–2022
JAWN
جَون · منصة كتّاب العرب

An online platform founded to gather Arab writers in a single creative space, built on the belief that Arabic literary voices deserve a dedicated, curated home on the internet.

As founder and director, managed a team of writers, curated cross-genre submissions, developed editorial calendars, and implemented SEO strategy.
